name: 05_metrics_single_contract_transport_dev_transport_ramc_uvw_stripmap_jobs
statement:
SELECT
  'contract' AS table_family,
  'transport_dev' AS catalog_name,
  'transport_ramc' AS schema_name,
  'uvw_stripmap_jobs' AS table_name,
  'VIEW' AS table_type,
  COUNT(*) AS row_count,
  COUNT(*) > 0 AS has_rows,
  GREATEST(MAX(try_cast(`Survey Date` AS TIMESTAMP)), MAX(try_cast(`completedstatus` AS TIMESTAMP)), MAX(try_cast(`completeduser` AS TIMESTAMP)), MAX(try_cast(`createddate` AS TIMESTAMP)), MAX(try_cast(`Created_Date_FY` AS TIMESTAMP)), MAX(try_cast(`duedate` AS TIMESTAMP)), MAX(try_cast(`completeddate` AS TIMESTAMP))) AS latest_observed_ts,
  LEAST(MIN(try_cast(`Survey Date` AS TIMESTAMP)), MIN(try_cast(`completedstatus` AS TIMESTAMP)), MIN(try_cast(`completeduser` AS TIMESTAMP)), MIN(try_cast(`createddate` AS TIMESTAMP)), MIN(try_cast(`Created_Date_FY` AS TIMESTAMP)), MIN(try_cast(`duedate` AS TIMESTAMP)), MIN(try_cast(`completeddate` AS TIMESTAMP))) AS earliest_observed_ts,
  'Survey Date|completedstatus|completeduser|createddate|Created_Date_FY|duedate|completeddate' AS freshness_columns
FROM `transport_dev`.`transport_ramc`.`uvw_stripmap_jobs`

error.message:
[INSUFFICIENT_PERMISSIONS] Insufficient privileges:
Table 'uvw_stripmap_jobs' does not have sufficient privilege to execute because the owner of one of the underlying resources failed an authorization check. SQLSTATE: 42501
